Custom Tripod X Display Hardware for Professional Banner Installations

Our Tripod X Display Hardware provides a professional, portable solution for displaying your 24x70 custom banners at trade shows, retail locations, and outdoor events. This durable banner display system features a collapsible tripod base for easy transport and setup, making it ideal for businesses that need reliable, reusable display hardware.

Professional Display Features

  • Tripod Base Design: Folds out for fast and easy setup at any location
  • Flexible Fiberglass Arms: Strong, flexible construction keeps banners taut and professional-looking
  • Portable Storage: Drawstring pouch included for convenient transport and storage
  • Reusable System: Compatible with multiple 24x70 banner designs (banner sold separately)

Display Specifications

  • Setup Size: 27" W x 78" H x 43.25" D when fully assembled
  • Weight: 1.12 lbs for easy portability
  • Banner Compatibility: Designed specifically for 24x70 banner dimensions
  • Setup Time: Quick assembly in under 2 minutes

This professional display hardware allows you to showcase custom banners with a clean, stable presentation that enhances your brand visibility at any venue.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Tripod X Display Hardware Construction Materials

Our Tripod X Display hardware is constructed with premium materials designed for durability and repeated use in various display environments.

Hardware Construction

  • Tripod Base: Lightweight yet sturdy metal construction with locking mechanisms
  • Support Arms: Flexible fiberglass rods that maintain banner tension without breaking
  • Connection Points: Reinforced attachment points for secure banner mounting
  • Finish: Powder-coated metal components resist scratching and wear

Durability Features

  • Weather Resistance: Suitable for indoor and covered outdoor display use
  • Flexibility: Fiberglass arms bend without breaking under wind pressure
  • Stability: Wide tripod base provides secure support for 24x70 banners
  • Longevity: Professional-grade materials ensure years of reliable display use

The combination of lightweight portability and durable construction makes this hardware ideal for businesses requiring frequent banner display setup and breakdown.

Your Tripod X Display Hardware arrives ready to use with all necessary components for immediate banner display setup.

Included Components

  • Tripod Base Unit: Pre-assembled with locking leg mechanisms

  • Banner Clips: Secure attachment points for 24x70 banner installation
  • Storage Pouch: Drawstring carrying bag for transport and storage

Professional Display Results

  • Portability: Lightweight design enables single-person setup and breakdown

Tripod X Display Hardware Production & Turnaround Times

At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for your display hardware orders. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from two to five business days, allowing you to make the final decision on when you need to order.

Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day.

Production Time Options

3 Business Day Standard

This is our most popular turnaround option for display hardware. Free standard production time and fast enough for most custom display needs.

2 Business Day Priority

When your display timeline is tight, choose our speedy 2-day priority option for faster hardware delivery.

5 Business Day Saver

If you aren't in a hurry, save money by choosing our 5 Day Saver option for display hardware orders.

Shipping Considerations

Please note: the total time to receive your Tripod X Display Hardware includes both production time and shipping time to your location. Display hardware ships separately from custom banners if ordered together.

All hardware undergoes quality inspection before shipment to ensure proper assembly and component completion.

Display Hardware Setup Instructions & Banner Requirements

Your Tripod X Display Hardware arrives ready to use with simple setup instructions. For optimal display results, ensure your 24x70 banners meet our recommended specifications.

Hardware Setup Instructions

  1. Unpack Components: Remove tripod base, fiberglass arms, and clips from carrying pouch
  2. Extend Tripod Base: Pull legs out and lock into position for stable foundation
  3. Install Support Arms: Insert fiberglass rods into top and bottom mounting points
  4. Attach Banner: Clip banner to top and bottom support arms for taut display
  5. Adjust Height: Fine-tune display height for optimal viewing angle

Compatible Banner Specifications

  • Banner Size: Exactly 24" wide x 70" tall for proper fit
  • Grommets Required: Top and bottom grommets for secure hardware attachment
  • Material Weight: 13oz vinyl or lighter materials recommended for stability
  • Grommet Spacing: Standard spacing compatible with hardware clip placement

Setup Tips for Best Results

  • Level Surface: Set up tripod base on level ground for maximum stability
  • Banner Tension: Ensure equal tension on both support arms for flat display
  • Wind Considerations: Use additional weights in outdoor or high-traffic areas
  • Storage: Always store hardware in included pouch to prevent component loss

Note: This hardware is designed specifically for 24x70 banners. Custom banners are sold separately and can be ordered to match your hardware specifications.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Tripod X Display Hardware

What banner sizes work with this display hardware?

This Tripod X Display Hardware is designed specifically for 24" wide x 70" tall banners. The hardware clips and support arms are positioned for this exact banner dimension to ensure proper tension and professional display results.

How much does the display hardware weigh?

The complete Tripod X Display Hardware system weighs only 1.12 pounds, making it extremely portable for trade shows, events, and business locations. The lightweight design allows easy transport while maintaining stability when set up.

Is the banner included with the hardware?

No, banners are sold separately. This allows you to order multiple custom 24x70 banners for use with your display hardware, or replace banners as your messaging changes while keeping the same professional hardware system.

How quickly does the display hardware set up?

The Tripod X Display Hardware can be fully assembled in under 2 minutes. Simply extend the tripod legs, insert the fiberglass support arms, and attach your banner using the included clips.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

The hardware is suitable for covered outdoor use or indoor applications. For outdoor use in windy conditions, additional weight or anchoring is recommended to ensure stability and prevent tipping.

What's included with the hardware purchase?

Your order includes the complete Tripod X Display system: tripod base with locking legs, two flexible fiberglass support arms, banner attachment clips, and a drawstring carrying pouch for storage and transport.

How do I store the display hardware between uses?

The tripod base folds flat and the fiberglass arms detach for compact storage. All components fit in the included drawstring pouch, making storage and transport convenient between display events.
